verse_text: Pilate said to them, 'You have a guard; go your way, make it as secure as you know how.'

links.context: Every man was to remain in his house on the Sabbath. Yet the Jewish leaders left their houses, contrary to the Law of Moses, to plot against Jesus ([[MAT.27:62]]-66; JohnChr). They broke the Law to plot against the Lawgiver.
The penalty for breaking the Sabbath was death. Yet the Jewish leaders did not rest on the Sabbath ([[MAT.27:62]]-66), but were running around and seeking to keep Christ in the tomb (AthanG).
